name: Tom Fitton
subject: What is Pelosi Hiding on Capitol Riot?
body:
Judicial Watch SUES for Capitol Riot Video!

[INSIDE JW]

BIDEN'S DANGEROUS ATTACK ON IMMIGRATION LAW

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52978&L=22139&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj12Zkp3TW1UVktCMCZmZWF0dXJlPXlvdXR1LmJlJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwMjIwMDEzNjMz]

You knew a border free for all was coming. Just yesterday, the Biden
administration put forward mass amnesty legislation. But President
Biden isn’t waiting on Congress, he already is dictatorially pushing
for effective amnesty by attempting to largely shut down enforcement
of our nation’s immigration laws. Here are the facts and their
significance in a Judicial Watch op-ed we wrote
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52978&L=22140&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly90aGVoaWxsLmNvbS9vcGluaW9uL2ltbWlncmF0aW9uLzUzOTMzNy1iaWRlbnMtZGFuZ2Vyb3VzLWJvcmRlci1wb2xpY3k/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAyMjAwMTM2MzM=]
for _The Hill_.

America is facing a worsening crisis of uncontrolled illegal
immigration. The Biden administration’s approach weakens the border
and nationalizes some of the most radical “sanctuary” practices.
This is dangerous and it undermines the rule of law.

Biden adopted the extremist tack during his first week in office,
issuing an executive order authorizing “catch and release
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52978&L=22141&F=T&
programs at the border, and freezing deportations. It also emerged
that Customs and Border Protection (CBP) is saying that apprehended
aliens are not being tested for COVID-19
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52978&L=22142&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94bmV3cy5jb20vdHJhbnNjcmlwdC90dWNrZXItYmlkZW4taW1taWdyYXRpb24tcG9saWN5LWRlc2lnbmVkLXRvLXB1bmlzaC1hbWVyaWNhbnM/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAyMjAwMTM2MzM=],
potentially introducing new disease vectors into the American
population at large. As such, releasing them into the country places
the public health at risk, not only from COVID-19 but also, as
Judicial Watch has reported
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52978&L=18224&F=T&],
from tuberculosis, pneumonia and other health risks.

The number of attempted border crossings has predictably been
increasing since the election. CBP Deputy Chief Raul Ortiz
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52978&L=22143&F=T&]
said
that, in the first ten days of February, CBP “has averaged more than
3,000 daily apprehensions” with a further daily “more than 1,000
border-crossing ‘got-aways,’ migrants whom agents were able to
detect but not detain.”

The Biden administration announced its 100-day freeze on deportations
while it evaluates further changes to Trump administration immigration
policies. A Jan. 20 memo from Department of Homeland Security (DHS)
Acting Secretary David Pekoske, “Review of and Interim Revision to
Civil Immigration Enforcement and Removal Policies and Procedures
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52978&L=22144&F=T&
laid out the details on the deportation freeze and new enforcement
priorities. The only “non-citizens” subject to removal (or even
questioning) under the terms of the memo are those deemed to be
national security threats, post-Nov. 1 border crossers, and those
“currently incarcerated for an aggravated felony
conviction and who are determined to be a threat to public
safety.” This means that Immigration and Customs Enforcement
(ICE) will not deport
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52978&L=22142&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94bmV3cy5jb20vdHJhbnNjcmlwdC90dWNrZXItYmlkZW4taW1taWdyYXRpb24tcG9saWN5LWRlc2lnbmVkLXRvLXB1bmlzaC1hbWVyaWNhbnM/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAyMjAwMTM2MzM=]
those
with other criminal records, including sex offenses, domestic
violence, drug violations, property crimes and any misdemeanors.

But Texas has put the brakes on the new policy, at least temporarily.
State Attorney General Ken Paxton sued the Biden administration over
the freeze, claiming that halting deportations was unconstitutional.
Last Monday, Judge Drew Tipton of the U.S. District Court for the
Southern District of Texas extended
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52978&L=22145&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY291cnRsaXN0ZW5lci5jb20vcmVjYXAvZ292LnVzY291cnRzLnR4c2QuMTgxMTgzNi9nb3YudXNjb3VydHMudHhzZC4xODExODM2LjY3LjBfMy5wZGY/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAyMjAwMTM2MzM=]
a
nationwide temporary restraining order against the deportation freeze,
ruling that allowing the Biden administration to go ahead with its
plans could potentially cause, as the state argues, “irreparable
harms
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52978&L=22146&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY291cnRsaXN0ZW5lci5jb20vZG9ja2V0LzM3MjUxMzE4LzEvc3RhdGUtb2YtdGV4YXMtdi11bml0ZWQtc3RhdGVzLW9mLWFtZXJpY2EvXSzigJ0/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAyMjAwMTM2MzM=
such as impacts to Texas’s law enforcement, housing, education,
employment, commerce and health care needs and budgets.

Paxton took to Twitter to declare an all-caps “VICTORY” against
“a seditious left-wing insurrection
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52978&L=22147&F=T&
But the Biden team apparently is defying the court — for
example, halting ICE deportation flights
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52978&L=22148&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGhlZ3VhcmRpYW4uY29tL3VzLW5ld3MvMjAyMS9mZWIvMDUvdXMtaGFpdGktZGVwb3J0YXRpb24tZmxpZ2h0cy1zdXNwZW5kZWQtaWNlLWltbWlncmF0aW9uP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwMjIwMDEzNjMz]
to
Haiti and countries in Africa in response to frantic lobbying by
immigration activists and members of Congress. If President Trump
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52978&L=22149&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly90aGVoaWxsLmNvbS9wZW9wbGUvZG9uYWxkLXRydW1wP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwMjIwMDEzNjMz]
had similarly obstructed a
court order, Democrats undoubtedly would have rushed to file more
articles of impeachment.

The dangers of Biden’s policy approach are obvious. We already have
the grim experience of releasing criminal illegals in sanctuary
cities. Last year, 92-year-old Queens resident Maria Fuertes
was raped and murdered
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52978&L=22150&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubnl0aW1lcy5jb20vMjAyMC8wMS8xNC9ueXJlZ2lvbi85Mi15ZWFyLW9sZC13b21hbi1xdWVlbnMtbXVyZGVyLmh0bWw/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAyMjAwMTM2MzM=],
allegedly by Reeaz Khan, a 21-year-old illegal from Guyana. Months
earlier, Khan was arrested in New York City for assault, and ICE
authorities requested that he be turned over
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52978&L=22151&F=T&]
for
possible deportation. Instead, Khan was released under New York
sanctuary policies.

We cannot count on the Biden administration to give us the full story
about the potentially negative impacts of its misguided policies.
White House press secretary Jen Psaki
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52978&L=22152&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly90aGVoaWxsLmNvbS9wZW9wbGUvamVuLXBzYWtpP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwMjIwMDEzNjMz]
seemed befuddled
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52978&L=22153&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly90d2l0dGVyLmNvbS9UcnVtcEpldzIvc3RhdHVzLzEzNTc3NTc5ODYwMjI4MjE4OTY/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAyMjAwMTM2MzM=]
when asked
about the lack of COVID-19 testing for those caught and released under
Biden’s new executive order. But recall that, in 2014, it was
revealed that the Obama-Biden administration had lied when it claimed
that the 2,200 detained illegals it released into the country for
budget reasons only had minor criminal records. In fact, internal
documents
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52978&L=22154&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudXNhdG9kYXkuY29tL3N0b3J5L25ld3MvbmF0aW9uLzIwMTQvMTAvMjIvaW1taWdyYXRpb24tZGV0YWluZWVzLXJlbGVhc2VkLWNyaW1pbmFsLXJlY29yZHMvMTc3MTQ5MjUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwMjIwMDEzNjMz]
were
uncovered that showed some of those who were released were facing
charges including “kidnapping, sexual assault, drug trafficking and
homicide.” Under the new Biden policy, at least we know that such
felons are already being given the green light to stay in the country.

These changes to immigration policies serve as critical examples of
the ideologically driven, extreme policy priorities of our supposedly
moderate president. Biden is effectively seeking open-borders amnesty
by hook or by crook, with zero regard for public health and safety –
or rule of law.

JUDICIAL WATCH SUES CAPITOL POLICE FOR RIOT EMAILS AND VIDEO

As we might expect of an agency overseen
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52978&L=22155&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudXNjcC5nb3YvdGhlLWRlcGFydG1lbnQvb3ZlcnNpZ2h0L2NvbmdyZXNzaW9uYWwtY29tbWl0dGVlcz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDIyMDAxMzYzMw==]
by four Congressional committees, the U.S. Capitol Police is not a
model of transparency or accountability.

We don’t trust Nancy Pelosi (or, frankly, any other politician) to
honestly examine the many controversies surrounding January 6, and so
we want a closer look.

Judicial Watch, stepping up for the American people, filed a lawsuit
against the U.S. Capitol Police seeking emails and videos concerning
the riot at the U.S. Capitol on January 6, 2021 (_Judicial Watch v.
United States Capitol Police_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52978&L=22132&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtdW5pdGVkLXN0YXRlcy1jYXBpdG9sLXBvbGljZS0xMjEtY3YtMDA0MDEvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwMjIwMDEzNjMz]
(No. 1:21-cv-00401)).

We sued under the common law right of access to public records after
the Capitol Police refused to provide any records in response to our
January 21, 2021, request for:

* Email communications between the U.S. Capitol Police Executive
Team and the Capitol Police Board concerning the security of the
Capitol on January 6, 2021. The timeframe of this request is from
January 1, 2021 through January 10, 2021.
* Email communications of the Capitol Police Board with the Federal
Bureau of Investigation, the U.S. Department of Justice, and the U.S.
Department of Homeland Security concerning the security of the Capitol
on January 6, 2021. The timeframe of this request is from January 1,
2021through January 10, 2021.
* All video footage from within the Capitol between 12 pm and 9 pm
on January 6, 2021

Conveniently, Congress exempts itself from the Freedom of Information
Act, and the Capitol Police declined to give us any records about the
riot, writing in a February 11, 2021
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52978&L=22133&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3BvbGljZS1yZXNwb25zZS1mZWJydWFyeS0xMS0yMDIxLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDIyMDAxMzYzMw==],
letter that the requested emails and videos are not “public
records.”

However, the public has a right to know about how Congress handled
security and what all the videos show of the U.S. Capitol riot. What
are Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer trying to hide from the American
people?

LAWSUIT: COACH FIRED FOR OBJECTING TO BLM/CRITICAL RACE THEORY IN
DAUGHTER’S CLASS

Too many children are being subjected to racial indoctrination in
their schools. And one parent who objected seems to have been fired
for objecting to their then-school’s attempted indoctrination of his
daughter in Black Lives Matter/critical race theory.

David Flynn, the father of two Dedham, Massachusetts, Public School
students, was removed from his position as head football coach after
exercising his right as a citizen to raise concerns about his
daughter’s seventh-grade history class curriculum being changed to
include biased coursework on politics, race, gender equality, and
diversity (_Flynn v. Forrest et al.
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52978&L=22119&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2ZseW5uLXYtZm9ycmVzdC1ldC1hbC0yMS1jdi0xMDI1Ni8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAyMjAwMTM2MzM=]
_(No.
21-cv-10256)).

We filed suit on his behalf in the United States District Court for
the District of Massachusetts, seeking damages against the
superintendent, high school principal, and high school athletic
director for retaliating against Flynn for exercising his First
Amendment rights. Attorney Andrew J. Couture of Leominster,
Massachusetts, is assisting.

The lawsuit details that in September 2020, Flynn’s daughter’s
seventh-grade history class, which was listed as “World Geography
and Ancient History I,” was taught issues of race, gender,
stereotypes, prejudices, discrimination, and politics. The lawsuit
explains:

In one assignment, Plaintiff’s daughter was asked to consider
various “risk factors” and “mitigating factors” that two
people – one identified as “white” and the other identified as
“black” – purportedly might use to assess each other on a city
street. Included among the various factors were skin color, gender,
age, physical appearance, and attire. “Black,” “aggressive body
language” and “wrong neighborhood” were among the “risk
factors” purportedly assessed by the person identified as
“white.” “White” and “Police officer” were among the
“risk factors” purportedly assessed by the person identified as
“black.”

Concerned about the abrupt change in curriculum, Flynn and his wife
contacted the history teacher and principal of the school – then
later Superintendent Michael J. Welch and three members of the Dedham
School Committee. On more than one occasion the Flynns asked for
assistance in resolving the issues with the curriculum. Ultimately, in
October 2020, the Flynns removed their children from school. The
Flynns’ list of concerns included:

* Dedham Public Schools changed the curriculum of the seventh-grade
history class without notifying parents or having a course description
and syllabus available for parents to review
* The new seventh-grade history class curriculum containing
coursework on politics, race, gender equality, and diversity that were
not suitable for twelve- and thirteen-year-olds;
* The seventh-grade history teacher not teaching topics
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52978&L=22156&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZS1pbWFnZXMvcGljdHVyZTItcG5nLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDIyMDAxMzYzMw==]
of
politics, race, gender equality, and diversity objectively;
* The seventh-grade history teacher using a cartoon character of
herself wearing a t-shirt supporting a controversial political
movement
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52978&L=22157&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZS1pbWFnZXMvcGljdHVyZTEtcG5nL107P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwMjIwMDEzNjMz
and
* The seventh-grade history teacher using class materials
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52978&L=22158&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZS1pbWFnZXMvcGljdHVyZTMtcG5nLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDIyMDAxMzYzMw==]
that
labeled all police officers as risks to all black people and all black
males as risks to white people.

In January 2021, Flynn, who had been the head football coach at Dedham
High School (DHS) since 2011, was called into a meeting with Welch as
well as the DHS principal and athletic director. At the meeting, Welch
handed Flynn one of the emails he had written to the Dedham School
Committee members and informed him that one of the committee members
asked Welch, “What are we going to do about this?” At the end of
the meeting Flynn was told that they, “were going in a different
direction” with the football program. Minutes later, the
superintendent, high school principal, and athletic director released
a public statement, stating that Flynn was removed as head football
coach because he “expressed significant philosophical differences
with the direction, goals, and values of the school district.”

Flynn’s written objections to the BLM/critical race theory included
the following point:

The Superintendent has had the opportunity to make sure the Dedham
teachers conduct themselves as professionals and to teach the courses
objectively and without biased opinions. He chose not to. I believe
that the real men and women in the world are the ones who have the
ability to compromise, especially in extremely controversial
situations. Compromise allows people to experience life as a
team. This is where unity brings individual pride together and
relationships begin to strengthen. I believe all relationships are
based on compromise. The Superintendent was not willing to
compromise. I explained to him that if the teacher teaches the
course objectively and removes the BLM logo from the class, people
will soon get over the fact that the class was purposely created
without notifying parents and without having a visible course
curriculum, syllabus and learning objective. Apparently, it does not
mean much to him that the Dedham Public School System is losing two
wonderful students.

We are asking the court to award damages to the Flynns and that a jury
trial be held. WCVB ABC 5 reported

since his firing, several rallies have been held by current and
former students, parents, and community members in support of
Flynn. At a January 21, 2021, rally, a former Dedham High School
football player said
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52978&L=22159&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2N2Yi5jb20vYXJ0aWNsZS9kZWRoYW0tc3R1ZGVudHMtcHJvdGVzdC1mb290YmFsbC1jb2FjaC1jaGFuZ2UvMzUyODMwMDE/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAyMjAwMTM2MzM=],

clean_body: Judicial Watch SUES for Capitol Riot Video! [INSIDE JW] BIDEN'S DANGEROUS ATTACK ON IMMIGRATION LAW [] You knew a border free for all was coming. Just yesterday, the Biden administration put forward mass amnesty legislation. But President Biden isn’t waiting on Congress, he already is dictatorially pushing for effective amnesty by attempting to largely shut down enforcement of our nation’s immigration laws. Here are the facts and their significance in a Judicial Watch op-ed we wrote [=] for The Hill. America is facing a worsening crisis of uncontrolled illegal immigration. The Biden administration’s approach weakens the border and nationalizes some of the most radical “sanctuary” practices. This is dangerous and it undermines the rule of law. Biden adopted the extremist tack during his first week in office, issuing an executive order authorizing “catch and release [= programs at the border, and freezing deportations. It also emerged that Customs and Border Protection (CBP) is saying that apprehended aliens are not being tested for COVID-19 [=], potentially introducing new disease vectors into the American population at large. As such, releasing them into the country places the public health at risk, not only from COVID-19 but also, as Judicial Watch has reported [], from tuberculosis, pneumonia and other health risks. The number of attempted border crossings has predictably been increasing since the election. CBP Deputy Chief Raul Ortiz [=] said that, in the first ten days of February, CBP “has averaged more than 3,000 daily apprehensions” with a further daily “more than 1,000 border-crossing ‘got-aways,’ migrants whom agents were able to detect but not detain.” The Biden administration announced its 100-day freeze on deportations while it evaluates further changes to Trump administration immigration policies. A Jan. 20 memo from Department of Homeland Security (DHS) Acting Secretary David Pekoske, “Review of and Interim Revision to Civil Immigration Enforcement and Removal Policies and Procedures [ laid out the details on the deportation freeze and new enforcement priorities. The only “non-citizens” subject to removal (or even questioning) under the terms of the memo are those deemed to be national security threats, post-Nov. 1 border crossers, and those “currently incarcerated for an aggravated felony conviction and who are determined to be a threat to public safety.” This means that Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) will not deport [=] those with other criminal records, including sex offenses, domestic violence, drug violations, property crimes and any misdemeanors. But Texas has put the brakes on the new policy, at least temporarily. State Attorney General Ken Paxton sued the Biden administration over the freeze, claiming that halting deportations was unconstitutional. Last Monday, Judge Drew Tipton of the U.S. District Court for the Southern District of Texas extended [=] a nationwide temporary restraining order against the deportation freeze, ruling that allowing the Biden administration to go ahead with its plans could potentially cause, as the state argues, “irreparable harms [= such as impacts to Texas’s law enforcement, housing, education, employment, commerce and health care needs and budgets. Paxton took to Twitter to declare an all-caps “VICTORY” against “a seditious left-wing insurrection [== But the Biden team apparently is defying the court — for example, halting ICE deportation flights [] to Haiti and countries in Africa in response to frantic lobbying by immigration activists and members of Congress. If President Trump [] had similarly obstructed a court order, Democrats undoubtedly would have rushed to file more articles of impeachment. The dangers of Biden’s policy approach are obvious. We already have the grim experience of releasing criminal illegals in sanctuary cities. Last year, 92-year-old Queens resident Maria Fuertes was raped and murdered [=], allegedly by Reeaz Khan, a 21-year-old illegal from Guyana. Months earlier, Khan was arrested in New York City for assault, and ICE authorities requested that he be turned over [=] for possible deportation. Instead, Khan was released under New York sanctuary policies. We cannot count on the Biden administration to give us the full story about the potentially negative impacts of its misguided policies. White House press secretary Jen Psaki [] seemed befuddled [=] when asked about the lack of COVID-19 testing for those caught and released under Biden’s new executive order. But recall that, in 2014, it was revealed that the Obama-Biden administration had lied when it claimed that the 2,200 detained illegals it released into the country for budget reasons only had minor criminal records. In fact, internal documents [] were uncovered that showed some of those who were released were facing charges including “kidnapping, sexual assault, drug trafficking and homicide.” Under the new Biden policy, at least we know that such felons are already being given the green light to stay in the country. These changes to immigration policies serve as critical examples of the ideologically driven, extreme policy priorities of our supposedly moderate president. Biden is effectively seeking open-borders amnesty by hook or by crook, with zero regard for public health and safety – or rule of law. JUDICIAL WATCH SUES CAPITOL POLICE FOR RIOT EMAILS AND VIDEO As we might expect of an agency overseen [==] by four Congressional committees, the U.S. Capitol Police is not a model of transparency or accountability. We don’t trust Nancy Pelosi (or, frankly, any other politician) to honestly examine the many controversies surrounding January 6, and so we want a closer look. Judicial Watch, stepping up for the American people, filed a lawsuit against the U.S. Capitol Police seeking emails and videos concerning the riot at the U.S. Capitol on January 6, 2021 (Judicial Watch v. United States Capitol Police [] (No. 1:21-cv-00401)). We sued under the common law right of access to public records after the Capitol Police refused to provide any records in response to our January 21, 2021, request for: Email communications between the U.S. Capitol Police Executive Team and the Capitol Police Board concerning the security of the Capitol on January 6, 2021. The timeframe of this request is from January 1, 2021 through January 10, 2021. Email communications of the Capitol Police Board with the Federal Bureau of Investigation, the U.S. Department of Justice, and the U.S. Department of Homeland Security concerning the security of the Capitol on January 6, 2021. The timeframe of this request is from January 1, 2021through January 10, 2021. All video footage from within the Capitol between 12 pm and 9 pm on January 6, 2021 Conveniently, Congress exempts itself from the Freedom of Information Act, and the Capitol Police declined to give us any records about the riot, writing in a February 11, 2021 [==], letter that the requested emails and videos are not “public records.” However, the public has a right to know about how Congress handled security and what all the videos show of the U.S. Capitol riot. What are Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer trying to hide from the American people? LAWSUIT: COACH FIRED FOR OBJECTING TO BLM/CRITICAL RACE THEORY IN DAUGHTER’S CLASS Too many children are being subjected to racial indoctrination in their schools. And one parent who objected seems to have been fired for objecting to their then-school’s attempted indoctrination of his daughter in Black Lives Matter/critical race theory. David Flynn, the father of two Dedham, Massachusetts, Public School students, was removed from his position as head football coach after exercising his right as a citizen to raise concerns about his daughter’s seventh-grade history class curriculum being changed to include biased coursework on politics, race, gender equality, and diversity (Flynn v. Forrest et al. [=] (No. 21-cv-10256)). We filed suit on his behalf in the United States District Court for the District of Massachusetts, seeking damages against the superintendent, high school principal, and high school athletic director for retaliating against Flynn for exercising his First Amendment rights. Attorney Andrew J. Couture of Leominster, Massachusetts, is assisting. The lawsuit details that in September 2020, Flynn’s daughter’s seventh-grade history class, which was listed as “World Geography and Ancient History I,” was taught issues of race, gender, stereotypes, prejudices, discrimination, and politics. The lawsuit explains: In one assignment, Plaintiff’s daughter was asked to consider various “risk factors” and “mitigating factors” that two people – one identified as “white” and the other identified as “black” – purportedly might use to assess each other on a city street. Included among the various factors were skin color, gender, age, physical appearance, and attire. “Black,” “aggressive body language” and “wrong neighborhood” were among the “risk factors” purportedly assessed by the person identified as “white.” “White” and “Police officer” were among the “risk factors” purportedly assessed by the person identified as “black.” Concerned about the abrupt change in curriculum, Flynn and his wife contacted the history teacher and principal of the school – then later Superintendent Michael J. Welch and three members of the Dedham School Committee. On more than one occasion the Flynns asked for assistance in resolving the issues with the curriculum. Ultimately, in October 2020, the Flynns removed their children from school. The Flynns’ list of concerns included: Dedham Public Schools changed the curriculum of the seventh-grade history class without notifying parents or having a course description and syllabus available for parents to review The new seventh-grade history class curriculum containing coursework on politics, race, gender equality, and diversity that were not suitable for twelve- and thirteen-year-olds; The seventh-grade history teacher not teaching topics [==] of politics, race, gender equality, and diversity objectively; The seventh-grade history teacher using a cartoon character of herself wearing a t-shirt supporting a controversial political movement [ and The seventh-grade history teacher using class materials [==] that labeled all police officers as risks to all black people and all black males as risks to white people. In January 2021, Flynn, who had been the head football coach at Dedham High School (DHS) since 2011, was called into a meeting with Welch as well as the DHS principal and athletic director. At the meeting, Welch handed Flynn one of the emails he had written to the Dedham School Committee members and informed him that one of the committee members asked Welch, “What are we going to do about this?” At the end of the meeting Flynn was told that they, “were going in a different direction” with the football program. Minutes later, the superintendent, high school principal, and athletic director released a public statement, stating that Flynn was removed as head football coach because he “expressed significant philosophical differences with the direction, goals, and values of the school district.” Flynn’s written objections to the BLM/critical race theory included the following point: The Superintendent has had the opportunity to make sure the Dedham teachers conduct themselves as professionals and to teach the courses objectively and without biased opinions. He chose not to. I believe that the real men and women in the world are the ones who have the ability to compromise, especially in extremely controversial situations. Compromise allows people to experience life as a team. This is where unity brings individual pride together and relationships begin to strengthen. I believe all relationships are based on compromise. The Superintendent was not willing to compromise. I explained to him that if the teacher teaches the course objectively and removes the BLM logo from the class, people will soon get over the fact that the class was purposely created without notifying parents and without having a visible course curriculum, syllabus and learning objective. Apparently, it does not mean much to him that the Dedham Public School System is losing two wonderful students. We are asking the court to award damages to the Flynns and that a jury trial be held. WCVB ABC 5 reported [=] that since his firing, several rallies have been held by current and former students, parents, and community members in support of Flynn. At a January 21, 2021, rally, a former Dedham High School football player said [=], “Everyone loves coach, he gets kids to play football. Coach Flynn is an awesome guy and we’re all devastated that they fired him.” Cancel culture has come to high school football. Coach Flynn was fired for exercising his constitutional right to object – as a citizen and father – to an extremist and racially inflammatory school curriculum in his child’s history class. We can’t let that stand. Until next week ... What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. This program allows you to donate up to $50 per individual (or $100 per couple) to the House DFL and receive a full refund from the state. Will you consider making the House DFL your 100% refundable contribution? If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately You can donate $50 (or $100 per couple) and it will be refunded to you by the state through the Minnesota Political Contribution Refund Program. Your 100% refundable contribution is vital to helping us build a better future that ALL Minnesotans deserve. name: Jacobs for Congress
subject: To cancel or not to cancel
body:
They're coming for Shakespeare
---
| | | | | | |
---
---
|
---
| Dear Friend,
They won't stop.
As if tearing down statues of Abraham Lincoln and George Washington wasn't bad enough, far-left activists have now set their sights on William Shakespeare.
[That's right, they want to "cancel" Hamlet and Romeo and Juliet from our kids' curriculum.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00160Y75Ar0sIPHmZpZiyuileUg4_oMy-hAzfGuT85DJIguP4UswnfYJp2wgau1FGPN3fcC1t7Onhkt8GihStEfH7MELcNQj7E2YtAb_ZhBpszN_CBafRUX1Fay44--cklSlS6rX8cJd74Pq4EhlXTvmKJISU7Ib7ayVVnWKlVdOiNbUcseYtkVpUx9pQ8NptoRpoGs46EDeQhhB_f_h9bIwZ5Qe9vM1y5Jju8tNp2Tu3XRwz3cWZY1sApgnKZxpaWH&c=vDQmyYlKfPuYg2gPASbzuSdjwk4HlqdHLPh88alQdV7xLNjbJGzF7w==&ch=o9gQgIsnqLW-CBVM-plP05IoG_MRFYj7FzPPgOGPdGkIoO_0Sc_51g==)
The woke left has decided that Shakespeare, his plays, and sonnets are a "tool of imperial oppression, white privilege and toxic masculinity" and must be "cancelled."
---
| There is no other way to put it, we are in a battle to save our education system, history, and culture of Western Civilization.
As Abraham Lincoln once said: "America will never be destroyed from the outside...If we falter and lose our freedoms, it will be because we destroyed ourselves."
We cannot let "cancel culture" and censorship continue to spread; we must push back and defend our nation's culture and freedoms - the same ones that have made us the greatest and most admired nation in the world. I'm committed to fighting for those freedoms in Congress, and with your support I will keep fighting for them.
---
| | | [I'll stand for our country](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00160Y75Ar0sIPHmZpZiyuileUg4_oMy-hAzfGuT85DJIguP4UswnfYJsdWRp_gBAJx0mNe55eTbMdpBobm6E1uN7dsaskDbKF_Aiud1wGr5DeWLi_hIDIrtVoNqLozsoxyOgK_lCyDaHIjwyl8ndj93vk7ClCQ27n8omAzKd28K-WU8ReHyklf3g==&c=vDQmyYlKfPuYg2gPASbzuSdjwk4HlqdHLPh88alQdV7xLNjbJGzF7w==&ch=o9gQgIsnqLW-CBVM-plP05IoG_MRFYj7FzPPgOGPdGkIoO_0Sc_51g==)
---
| Join me in standing for our nation's future.
Sincerely,
Chris Jacobs Member of Congress (NY-27)

name: Josh Hawley
subject: He's not listening
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
body:
What happened to unity? One month in, Joe Biden isn't talking about that anymore. [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=98c820fa5706443183ac49f01ad54a01&_e=PAJmnG5eamZffvoy-wr51OE88220qaa4GG6znsZ8WEQgd-dO2j1NAyzfJrvD07Saz4or-mNp4hzu02-IMRU3_rARHB0dlpqZhROvuOO1f0jvZPwK5214fj7vmhc9-PimsZfvDMhpWjOXNrJoTSSAYm2pbcbtw0gAvZgfQRsOGKJXvgEw_fHpt85RLCH8k4fdpK7Bv69wTAoL8FWdMyBzmO2cbH7cfW8D_QFT24MAXt8RVP855QIozHu1POkT7FO5RBFznVChathjOuWvLjaNej4IWZKqyydjZzYdyFOro_C1Z8L4VTI4ZE_otU69CHhynkIHM530G9-6ZyoezXZA6KiLHlq8CXJsvlAMat6LaMg%3D) | |
---
Peter,
**What happened to unity?**

One month in, Joe Biden isn’t talking about that anymore.

**He’s not listening to parents** who want to know when the schools will reopen.

**He’s not seeking common ground** with pro-life Americans whose tax dollars he is using to pay for overseas abortions.

**He’s not addressing your concerns** about the surge in violent crime in our cities or the prospect of a surge in illegal immigration across our border in the midst of a pandemic.

No, in his first month as president, “moderate” Joe Biden has revealed the truth about the Democratic establishment: It’s not moderate at all. _**It’s hard left.**_

_The mainstream media are all in on protecting Biden’s image._ When the White House reporters get face time with him, they talk about donuts and coffee. They’re not going to ask him the tough questions about the divisive agenda the Democrats are pushing. _**They don’t want you to know the Democrats have an agenda at all!**_

**Instead, they want the focus to be on _YOU_.** You’re a bigot because you supported Donald Trump. You're unpatriotic because you’re not thrilled to see Joe Biden back in the Oval Office. If you don’t like what he’s doing, if you’re asking questions, you need to be silenced.

The Democrats can insult you all they want. The social media companies can make their best effort to censor you. _But no matter how hard they try to keep your voice from being heard, you can count on me to hold Joe Biden’s feet to the fire._

_**But I need support from American patriots like YOU!**_

[_**Stand Up for America’s Future! >>>**_](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=98c820fa5706443183ac49f01ad54a01&_e=PAJmnG5eamZffvoy-wr51Pb1skclfOOSas80xkoTGhYOoeZxhu4sJUhQ0tTe-zG8SwrvgHy-LaT5nx3qygnnYZItnSheMyhxA-PWj8f6WS1rYhM3kCUsw3tDHuILu4lX3032RAf5sy4PfV2LZcHvxLnTsmePhPLPB0d_Igtws4PywbFfjhdJQccKh-cGyFSKABM6cWEbduzh1Zh9r_IzhQ57U5vYuQNo2eGrgvTuPJ0VBffbmQJ64b4NLpCnvF7koePRHG8TAxPP8Vwd6dPXIPCXu_VNxfHx5Lpf7ACw46r6uIH423kOsCs_qtq1h3Rbhwm9Gf3h8fLaWLzrgswkxGU-gG5isuaYLD9zroX9C5PJXZAvuOagU2xF2eqIfquXvzNcggObJBj-kKHLkTc06PF55zgFrSAkspmqVJ-5t_8%3D)
**The science says schools can safely reopen, so why is Biden prioritizing partisan teachers’ unions over children and parents?**

What does Biden have to say to the thousands of workers he abandoned by laying off the workers at the Keystone Pipeline before creating the “green jobs” he promised?

_**Why does Biden think pro-life Americans need to fund abortions with their tax dollars?**_

_You know the answer._ Because this “moderate Joe” routine was never serious. And now it needs to be exposed.

_**Please join me and my team in this effort to hold career politicians like Biden accountable. **_
[**Demand Answers _NOW_!**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=98c820fa5706443183ac49f01ad54a01&_e=PAJmnG5eamZffvoy-wr51Pb1skclfOOSas80xkoTGhYOoeZxhu4sJUhQ0tTe-zG8SwrvgHy-LaT5nx3qygnnYZItnSheMyhxA-PWj8f6WS1rYhM3kCUsw3tDHuILu4lX3032RAf5sy4PfV2LZcHvxLnTsmePhPLPB0d_Igtws4PywbFfjhdJQccKh-cGyFSKABM6cWEbduzh1Zh9r_IzhWaBg_rfpmB2ob2yL4QhDt7Ks6edBp8lc7m-n9Y2nMgVhk3QxYhybQpOO2FtSTvUxAm5uwl5IJGy8c928VcuWWOdXXttM9mXWx5Uw4XthXtcFXfy2Wc7WvBNl6h5Xynx9DFX1W08-RIWPr8b7ETbV7uVDbRKV-AbTq8XGTFed2JSfGEWVAfeemEYWO8YBCcteg_cwhIePPRgli0W_DIXfKc%3D)

Thank you,
Josh Hawley

name: Team Cammack
subject: We need to keep moving
body:
Rebuild our economy
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZvMuYvan2mDHBJFtNvhIQyqI5IJvQuVxl42fcgskDti3q1-OYCeG2ubwUvOG4cxTsAPOBa6ecov-l9RKUmiQ3tg4QFk4byNstF1e4wTJI4kIYKEUwbjH41qd59gzuyA12bA3qd21K7BKRWkB9VBQXHJD1XZKw8Ptrh-VZcBDDL9XixnIy-OYUg==&c=2fSxvwzF3u-9CzMK0vCxtsnaGxL2CSxbU6VCObCK_5olpWznAIO-MA==&ch=2kGSU9xijbwxBGVnId1ysvArp9VWr_C07iA1J-9OysTuAnA7TRdA9A==)
---
| Patriot,
In North Central Florida, we are tired of the political games in D.C. We need real actions and real solutions.
Kat has one priority right now, and that's reopening our economy. We need our children across the country back in school, people back at work, and we need to focus on rebuilding our economy nationwide.
Meanwhile, the left has prioritized opening the borders, shutting down American energy jobs, and yet another failed impeachment attempt of a private citizen. The American people need leadership right now, not political theater and radical ideologies.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZvMuYvan2mDHBJFtNvhIQyqI5IJvQuVxl42fcgskDti3q1-OYCeG2ubwUvOG4cxT_fHsJ6R0Y51KYROgZDDwbw14Ypi-g0HDdJzNLfThj0CmjBJgR4GCzoHgW1ZMoJAB6YNX_VXVphx_-lkg2oUpMh7baUVaHXr197jqpYVvuu4hWtwerr-9TmLtGNOWu_gMEfzXoFgKuHdpiHus7pRYcATET1j-y2VrltNB-Zokx8NUUNVz_Si0jke1RtlWsOHLMGE3Y29Yx0qJCB8bd5ii6mMlfrlnHBQfLRu-rhJIlm6QUP1YDU5Bg-OuzEcz3_r0&c=2fSxvwzF3u-9CzMK0vCxtsnaGxL2CSxbU6VCObCK_5olpWznAIO-MA==&ch=2kGSU9xijbwxBGVnId1ysvArp9VWr_C07iA1J-9OysTuAnA7TRdA9A==)
---
| | | [REOPEN OUR ECONOMY](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZvMuYvan2mDHBJFtNvhIQyqI5IJvQuVxl42fcgskDti3q1-OYCeG2ubwUvOG4cxTsAPOBa6ecov-l9RKUmiQ3tg4QFk4byNstF1e4wTJI4kIYKEUwbjH41qd59gzuyA12bA3qd21K7BKRWkB9VBQXHJD1XZKw8Ptrh-VZcBDDL9XixnIy-OYUg==&c=2fSxvwzF3u-9CzMK0vCxtsnaGxL2CSxbU6VCObCK_5olpWznAIO-MA==&ch=2kGSU9xijbwxBGVnId1ysvArp9VWr_C07iA1J-9OysTuAnA7TRdA9A==)
---
| Kat is tired of the games. It's time for Congress to get to work for the American people and stop the bleeding. In a recent interview, Kat said:
"We still have folks, in my district in particular, that didn't even receive the first stimulus check. And now they are talking about a third? This is crazy! This is ludicrous! This is government spending gone awry at its worst."
We need common-sense actions aimed at improving the lives of Americans. We can work towards this and get the job done, but only with your help. [Can Kat count on your support to help get America moving again?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZvMuYvan2mDHBJFtNvhIQyqI5IJvQuVxl42fcgskDti3q1-OYCeG2ubwUvOG4cxTsAPOBa6ecov-l9RKUmiQ3tg4QFk4byNstF1e4wTJI4kIYKEUwbjH41qd59gzuyA12bA3qd21K7BKRWkB9VBQXHJD1XZKw8Ptrh-VZcBDDL9XixnIy-OYUg==&c=2fSxvwzF3u-9CzMK0vCxtsnaGxL2CSxbU6VCObCK_5olpWznAIO-MA==&ch=2kGSU9xijbwxBGVnId1ysvArp9VWr_C07iA1J-9OysTuAnA7TRdA9A==)

clean_body: Rebuild our economy | | | | | | == | Patriot, In North Central Florida, we are tired of the political games in D.C. We need real actions and real solutions. Kat has one priority right now, and that's reopening our economy. We need our children across the country back in school, people back at work, and we need to focus on rebuilding our economy nationwide. Meanwhile, the left has prioritized opening the borders, shutting down American energy jobs, and yet another failed impeachment attempt of a private citizen. The American people need leadership right now, not political theater and radical ideologies. | == | | | == | Kat is tired of the games. It's time for Congress to get to work for the American people and stop the bleeding. In a recent interview, Kat said: "We still have folks, in my district in particular, that didn't even receive the first stimulus check. And now they are talking about a third? This is crazy! This is ludicrous! This is government spending gone awry at its worst." We need common-sense actions aimed at improving the lives of Americans. We can work towards this and get the job done, but only with your help. == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | Thanks for your continued support! For Florida, Team Cammack | | | | == | == == == | | Kat for Congress | 5200 NW 43rd Street, Suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 | | Sent by mailto:info@katforcongress.com

body:

Friend,

The House impeached Trump TWICE and it was Republicans in the Senate that stopped this madness both times.

**BOTTOM LINE: The Senate is our firewall. We are the last line of defense against the Radical Leftists.**

**[**TAKE BACK THE SENATE**](https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/chairman-scott?sc=pem8815m13m&utm_campaign=20210219_TY.100609_rick-scott-nrsc-chairman_t1048466-575&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210219_trumps-legacy-is-in-danger)**

name: Tim Scott
subject: When will it end, Friend?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:

I wanted to personally pass along this important memo, so you can see what's at stake.

Newt Gingrich here.

I wanted to personally pass along this important memo, so you can see what's at stake.

Only 5 seats need to flip from Democrat to Republican in order to fire Nancy Pelosi from her role as Speaker of the House. I am confident that we can win back our Conservative Majority, but it will take all top patriots chipping in.

[**Please make an immediate 500% matched gift to stand with House Conservatives!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_uFMYxoao_3OvoD-ylJA1JkvLIsRqma3R93mq_FJx79nj0cV-5pOHcZw0zeGqWnQ1GS12DEgEx4G-pP2IxSf02WdTyoCty-YflcJi2Q-5w7-X_RUFbAfK8lTnF8mlHK5fsILAK6pJXp3npAyzAcpYt1A-ytLIyKyw95xWfP9MzuhQgDA3TjC6WRoT76SjSMSBdeO0W4q8VXf_2MY1s0XAF0F8C87UA3wTta2PxwPDJ76zSPm2Gyc3o-mRx_WD8w1cNPFgmUUy7YRHLGY1wtMxSHlxUl7nlAkLwOSe4uZkmIp384GYR0xwMdU41FQiOl-4SIsNe3cD-ro1INERGotSsjjZEXmOr7e58u_6eUTUXcD7byfR34h0TDxrrcyasMqqqb733dOjM9bD2s_ZCVht8Abr4UySdT0ij-7MOYBW08WSC7SN0Y26oz_5du0ZCX_ei-ibOe1WG9ZLGeFADcTx1pLvcJnrTUE&c=0EgNZkUOwnwKSIyC-yQmMCJIk4LTfTNlF0NctFV53PQb4pGu7ELS2A==&ch=rF4o6zQLK-Jcz8nRmJiBE7rrCixao_oSFxvC95SOeLZYNF8cyAtXcw==)

The actions we take now will shape the future of our nation. Join me in standing up to Joe Biden, Chuck Schumer, and Nancy Pelosi.

Let's take back the House!

Newt Gingrich

*****Internal GOP Memo*****
Attn: Top Conservatives
Re: Our nation's future

Here's some information that you need to know:
***** House Democrats have **$8.4 million MORE** in cash on hand compared to House Republicans.

***** Democrats are already **planning to spend hundreds of millions** on attack ads in battleground districts.

***** In 2020, just **32,000 votes and 5 seats made the difference** between a Democrat and Republican Majority in the House.

body:
Despite President Biden's call for unity during his inauguration speech, he is already embracing far-left socialist positions.

Despite President Biden's call for unity during his inauguration speech, he is already embracing far-left socialist positions. Biden is calling for trillions in new spending to appease the far-left base of his party.

clean_body: Notice for %%First Name%%. You haven't responded yet. == | SURVEY STATUS: PENDING RESPOND: == Friend, our survey team wanted to reach out to make sure this wasn't a mistake... We see that the response is missing, and we wanted to give you a second chance to fill out our survey and share your feedback with Team Young. As you know, Young is fighting for the policies that matter most to California's 39th District. From lowering taxes to affordable healthcare to a COVID-19 recovery plan, Young's vision is for a better, safer, and stronger future for all of us. And Friend, we want you to be a part of that vision. == With the Democrats' tight grip on the House of Representatives, Senate, and White House, our plan to preserve our conservative values has never been more important. == \-- Team Young Survey Paid for by Young Kim for Congress PO Box 2186 Fullerton CA, 92837 == ** ** | | Young Kim for Congress | PO Box 2186, Fullerton, CA 92837 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

body:
%%First Name%%, believe it or not, the Democrats are already making moves to flip this seat from red to blue.zwnj;
****

. Friend,

Michelle Steel has been fighting for taxpayers her entire life.

When she first came to America with her single mother, she discovered a system that was failing the very people it was supposed to help. She saw how the system unfairly taxed her mom's small business and how hard her mother fought to keep it going.

From there, Michelle has returned more than $400 million to California taxpayers and fought against policies that raise taxes and hurt small businesses. Michelle Steel continues to fight for lower taxes and common-sense solutions that work to make California a more affordable place to live and so that everyone who wants to pursue their goals can have the same American Dream that she had.

[**But we can 't make this happen without your help, Friend.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001C_jeRd_025dkwKkG8dLr_4bJhX0VEuKiwTrQiwb5nbpBNCPqVbPwfPk5NlploHZXjeyIpSjecOiQJxvyrjRBgyInWTZEx9rAlA01iUbyC2DknEWO0ZQ1ljp1lRk8np5T10YWdrx_Wmaj5By0xa2qXjRNqB2o2DY32WW4eFLRnaPzWjoUf5PhjmtPJT2W0YbDaWtm57pRdt1VoUMGSl3nNHrf-v27VRbRNP4lDeZGTmKhkFewvUO-anVTHGQViul-sa4AXLuJukyMjPUruvHmg3mMsmYTL4rPp3vNasWfGQ_fKOLOdFrM8rjBRj3EbAbxXmW94p4syq9T03IOs9iARYJOd1ESxvfbI6HqgK9Wzgz28P2INg_GOq_tRFn-rHxVFfJkGPAjd-9BrGLYSsxeE60buHwT0NFW6RwZQwYef6btIJuDJjm6xtyXON2qENO9ECITAlOsr53rjRvjqm3ZVFwJwRkqVD1bv8EMOK2LVM4=&c=GJJOh7LrhBTdNoIP1nqVn7wB3lp5q7xiqALzOgWbYJl-74ZhmSe65Q==&ch=e5lIUOl-3SUXS8YuGgeFNBcD4lNjAdpoEKQ_9Yg7sHLycsSYo3XxyQ==) As you know, Nancy Pelosi and the Democrats are working overtime to undo common-sense conservative policies and enact job-killing tax hikes that hurt small businesses. **We can 't let that happen.**

To make sure we can lower taxes, create more jobs, and get this economy back on track, we need to win back the House in 2022. That's why we have to act now. [**Can we count on your support to help win back the House for Republicans? clean_body: %%First Name%%, believe it or not, the Democrats are already making moves to flip this seat from red to blue.zwnj; ** . == Friend, Michelle Steel has been fighting for taxpayers her entire life. When she first came to America with her single mother, she discovered a system that was failing the very people it was supposed to help. She saw how the system unfairly taxed her mom's small business and how hard her mother fought to keep it going. From there, Michelle has returned more than $400 million to California taxpayers and fought against policies that raise taxes and hurt small businesses. Michelle Steel continues to fight for lower taxes and common-sense solutions that work to make California a more affordable place to live and so that everyone who wants to pursue their goals can have the same American Dream that she had. == == | Join our team and show your support for lowering taxes, creating jobs, and making the system work for California families! == == As you know, Nancy Pelosi and the Democrats are working overtime to undo common-sense conservative policies and enact job-killing tax hikes that hurt small businesses. We can 't let that happen.** To make sure we can lower taxes, create more jobs, and get this economy back on track, we need to win back the House in 2022. That's why we have to act now. == With your help, we can make it happen. Thank you, Team Steel With so much uncertainty right now, we know not everyone will be able to contribute. But even if you're unable to chip in right now, we could still use your help. == == Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress P.O Box 472 Surfside, CA 90743== == == == == | | Michelle Steel for Congress | 8907 Warner Ave Suite 220, Huntington Beach, CA 92647 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

name: Team Fair Fight Action
subject: Join Us! Daily Voting Rights Caucus Hearings Starting Monday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Action
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa368/34a064cc/1d43cdb8/7026ad0/4157691295/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | Friend- On Tuesday, both members of the public and legislators on both sides of the aisle--saw the surprise release of HB 531, an anti-voting bill that contains a set of proposals that would have devastating consequences for voting rights in Georgia. These restrictions are dangerous, unnecessary, and disenfranchising. The rushed process of filing and hearing HB 531 cut Georgians out, and it's outrageous to push a bill like this so quickly without a chance for the public to know, see, or comment on it. **Because we want to ensure that you are informed, Fair Fight Action is hosting a series of public hearings to break down the devastating effects that HB 531 would have on our election. ** Certain members of Georgia's legislature may want to push this bill through without any public input, but we want to make sure you are informed and empowered to hold your elected officials accountable. **Fair Fight Action invites you to join us for our Voting Rights Caucus Daily Hearings starting on Monday, February 22.** Each day next week, Fair Fight Action invites you to hear testimony from community leaders and other civil and voting rights advocates surrounding HB 531. The schedule of hearings is as follows: **Monday: Launch of Daily Voting Rights Caucus Hearings ** Date: Monday, February 22 Time: 11:30 AM -12:30 PM Zoom Registration: [http://bit.ly/vrcaucus](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa368/34a064cc/1d43cdb8/7026ad1/4157691295/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://bit.ly/vrcaucus") **Tuesday: County Election Administration and Tax-Payer Impacts ** Date: Tuesday, February 23 Time: 1 PM- 2 PM Zoom Registration: [http://bit.ly/CountyCosts](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa368/34a064cc/1d43cdb8/7026ade/4157691295/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://bit.ly/CountyCosts") **Wednesday: Save Souls to the Polls ** Date: Wednesday, February 24 Time: 7 PM - 8 PM Zoom Registration: [http://bit.ly/SundayVoting](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa368/34a064cc/1d43cdb8/7026adf/4157691295/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://bit.ly/SundayVoting") **Thursday: Protect Georgia Voters ' Identity** Date: Thursday, February 25 Time: 1 PM - 2 PM Zoom Registration: [http://bit.ly/VoterIdentity](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa368/34a064cc/1d43cdb8/7026adc/4157691295/VEsD/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://bit.ly/VoterIdentity") The 2020 election saw historic participation; trying to restrict voting and access to voting now is flatly unacceptable. Join us daily next week as we work to continue to hold our elected officials accountable and stand up for voting rights in Georgia. In Solidarity, Team Fair Fight Action |
---|---|---

Voter suppression tactics are nothing new -- something the late Congressman John Lewis knew all too well.
That's why 56 years ago -- during the height of the Civil Rights movement -- Congress passed the _Voting Rights Act_ , which aimed to protect the votes of people of color by making discriminatory voting practices illegal.
Despite this historic legislation, voter suppression tactics are still alive and well. Between voter roll purging, unnecessarily strict voter ID laws, and intentionally limited polling places, Republican-led legislatures are doing everything in their power to make it harder for traditionally Democratic voters to participate in our democracy.
**_What can we do?_ We can start by passing the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act, which will help restore voting rights. **
[**Will you sign on to demand our nation's leaders protect voters' rights by passing the _John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act_?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/25289805/273395373/-1596900047?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgzMzY4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQxNzU3ZDA5LWQyNzMtZWIxMS05ODg5LTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=RdepbggShHYSjXc9ENw7Olmimvh12nSfI8-wKsPKslQ=&emci=12302d42-d173-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&emdi=d1757d09-d273-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&ceid=16080230)
Thank you so much,
– _Every. Single. Vote._

We want to thank everyone that attended and all of our generous sponsors for helping to make this event so successful! | | | | | | Thank you all again! \- NH Senate Republicans | | | | | | | | | | | | | Paid for by the New Hampshire Senate Republican PAC, Chuck Morse Chairman | | | NH Senate Republicans PAC | | P.O. Box 30, Concord NH 03301 United States | You received this email because you signed up on our website or at an event.

Peter,

I have exciting news.

As you know, I made fighting for Term Limits one of my top campaign promises when I was running for Congress.

**Now, I’m happy to announce I’ve just co-sponsored legislation on TERM LIMITS that would: **
* **Limit serving in the House of Representatives to a maximum of 3 TERMS or a total of 6 YEARS!**
* **Limit serving in the Senate to a maximum of 2 TERMS or a total of 12 YEARS!**

[**Promises Made, Promises Kept!**](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=10111b23099947c89dd3142ced6b29ba&_e=t_lPYpPBLh6XKUDgDSNsO7_sT8ZNsnwgKF3E0mjgsgVSfh1kO26-uTZQxyWTPvLlZgbikUKR0pNMnMambFJmbaTcDkgJ57ae3lJs6MgC794w9Rd-i1L0wHZXHjKsNZx2prY3Na5-_yjF4zBw3696Dhue330Ojt3xQIGeGJtDh9M9wDWV_8ik_aUEaPmJ6GySP-zRuc9OEAnXxN1JVLwljpClfwQVkZUfuaBZ5mKaHtGILcqJ7e6s1QU7mDnWpK2exmJEII3-cuihAJdXzL-ehoalT_HWYb7XorS-0OJKOZ9Q1bBuhVoWUSdZuPYWIPILXQaJXfcfqDQCYvQAyme_C98mxuqXO2ae37heTPGxKkLYSoNYiP6GK_XZoD1o2nFRZOswN3B5jCwQRUWJODS5oq7RBAMS1Yrv0Zj4g8vvlCCwWWmHxoP0MwGKSmN7p_fsHzH2gYFXfexsRm_AzgZYy0fk4IOXIq_nGHZbjxvOU_Kj4CT2A5FwqTZ6YqQNkLS2)
Peter, when I made that pledge, I meant every word of it!

I’m deeply committed to rooting out the career politicians and corruption in Washington. Unfortunately, that same group of powerful Washington insiders are well-funded and incredibly powerful.

That’s why I need your help.

If we’re going to defeat these career politicians, we need to be able to counter their attacks with our own grassroots fundraising efforts. [**_If everyone was able to chip in just $5, $10 or even $25 it will go a long way to win the fight for Term Limits!_**](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=10111b23099947c89dd3142ced6b29ba&_e=t_lPYpPBLh6XKUDgDSNsO7_sT8ZNsnwgKF3E0mjgsgVSfh1kO26-uTZQxyWTPvLlZgbikUKR0pNMnMambFJmbaTcDkgJ57ae3lJs6MgC794w9Rd-i1L0wHZXHjKsNZx2prY3Na5-_yjF4zBw3696Dhue330Ojt3xQIGeGJtDh9M9wDWV_8ik_aUEaPmJ6GySP-zRuc9OEAnXxN1JVLwljpClfwQVkZUfuaBZ5mKaHtGILcqJ7e6s1QU7mDnWpK2exmJEII3-cuihAJdXzL-ehoalT_HWYb7XorS-0OJKOZ_wI0UADtXf2gML8AE9oVigjJCB5cWInJKWb5jtK4k8TlLHw90zILGE9HjSGyzJtmr5F0YvOlUdI738OAUlpO9LLI51XHK4aY-55CrU-1uYKS5NZp61HOzzd3LpOZRIUQZkecr5c7IcPZrCTmVR9Y7O87vqUjPmoYW_9zL0tFcXHGi6M3_1HGtVdVKdvqXhDQz4tjq920NapLBQLEPh-f44)

name: True the Vote
subject: The Past Few Days | True the Vote Weekly Update | 2.20.21
body:
A weekly wrap up of all things election integrity.
**The Past Few Days**
The past few days have been difficult here in our home state of Texas. Millions have been without power or water all week (including yours truly). Now the snow has melted and the cleanup begins.
But time spent in the cold was made colder still by the loss of Rush Limbaugh. His steady presence was a source of assurance; a familiar voice giving wise insight, year upon year. He will be sorely missed.
It was a tough week all the way around.
On the election integrity front there were several bright spots, including the Georgia legislature’s vote to improve mail-in ballot security and [epic comments](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ3d3cuZGFpbHl3aXJlLmNvbSUyRm5ld3MlMkZ3YXRjaC1wb3VuZC1zYW5kLWRlc2FudGlzLWlzc3Vlcy1lbGVjdGlvbi1pbnRlZ3JpdHktcHJvcG9zYWxz&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=369A866A20A4013) made by Florida’s Governor Ron DeSantis who spoke boldly about his commitment to transparency and accountability in election processes.
And friends, that’s where I’ll end this week’s comments. There’s much more I could write, but it’ll keep.
Except for this ... staying connected matters. You matter - to me, to True the Vote, and to the amazing country we share. Our best days are ahead.
**Ever Onward,**

Catherine Engelbrecht
Founder, True the Vote
* * *
**TRUE THE VOTE NEWS**
[**Georgia's Elections Omnibus**](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ3d3cubGVnaXMuZ2EuZ292JTJG&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=369A866A20A4020)
This week, legislation proposed by Georgia Republicans moved forward in both the state house and senate. In both sets of sweeping proposals, among the issues addressed were voter ID requirements and so-called "at will" absentee voting.
In the Senate, [SB71](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ3d3cubGVnaXMuZ2EuZ292JTJGbGVnaXNsYXRpb24lMkY1OTIyNA==&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=369A866A20A4019) would require that a voter provide a reason for requesting an absentee ballot. This is an obviously important way to protect the integrity of the process and prevent fraud.
In the House, HB 531 would also limit conditions under which a voter could request an absentee ballot, and would additionally require a photo ID in order to obtain one.
The wide-ranging proposed legislation in Georgia represents the voice of the people, and their strong desire after the chaos of the last months of the 2020 election, to return to confidence and security in the vote.
True the Vote will keep an eye on this and _all_ voter-related legislation throughout the coming months, and there promises to be a great deal.
* * *
[**Working Together For Accountability, Integrity, And Fairness**](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZ2b2x1bnRlZXIlMkY=&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=369A866A20A4012)
There is still a great deal more yet to be done in the fight for the vote.
You can be a part of the process along with True the Vote. Just staying informed as citizen by receiving all our news and updates, you'll be helping to ensure the health of our system.
[VOLUNTEER](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZ2b2x1bnRlZXIlMkY=&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=369A866A20A4012)
* * *
**Engage with us on Social Media!**
[ ](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=https://www.facebook.com/TrueTheVote&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=369A866A20A4014)[ ](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ3d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20lMkZ1c2VyJTJGVHJ1ZVRoZVZvdGU=&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=369A866A20A4015)[ ](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=https://rumble.com/user/TruetheVote&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=369A866A20A4016)[](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZwYXJsZXIuY29tJTJGcHJvZmlsZSUyRlRydWV0aGVWb3RlJTJGcG9zdHM=&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=369A866A20A4017)

name: Team Ro
subject: One month since inauguration: what we’ve done
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
Since inauguration, Ro has been working in Congress to get COVID-19 relief to the people, making sure Wall Street hedge funds are held to the same rules as Main Street, holding members of Congress accountable for their part in inciting violence on the Capitol, and so much more.
#
It’s already been a whole month since Joe Biden's inauguration.
Since then Ro has been working in Congress to get COVID-19 relief to the people, making sure Wall Street hedge funds are held to the same rules as Main Street, holding members of Congress accountable for their part in inciting violence on the Capitol, and so much more.
With a Democratic majority in the House, Senate, and White House, 2021 should be a year of passing meaningful legislation. But too many pundits and special interest-friendly politicians are willing to ignore the struggles of working families. We are going to have to work and fight to pass laws like Medicare for All and a $15 minimum wage.
**Ro is fighting these fights – but he needs your support now more than ever to get it all done.[Can you make a donation right now to make sure we keep up this work to keep pushing for this legislation in Congress and on the ground?](https://act.rokhanna.com/go/6042?refcode=ema-1650&t=20&akid=1650%2E946728%2EiQ2BhC)**
**[Contribute](https://act.rokhanna.com/go/6042?refcode=em-1650&amounts=&t=21&akid=1650%2E946728%2EiQ2BhC)**
Yesterday, House Democrats unveiled a $1.9 million COVID-19 relief bill that would include $1,400 checks for those making less than $75,000 a year, extend unemployment benefits and provide more aid for small businesses — _and while this is progress, it’s far from enough._
That’s why Ro is pushing in Congress for more relief, on top of all the vital progressive issues that we have been fighting for _years_. But here’s the thing: what we are able to accomplish this year depends on what financial backing we have to get the work done.
**[Small-dollar donations are what keep Ro and this movement powered up for the fights ahead. Can you make a contribution of whatever you can afford right now to help us keep fighting?](https://act.rokhanna.com/go/6042?refcode=ema-1650&t=22&akid=1650%2E946728%2EiQ2BhC)**
Together,
Team Ro

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ro-khanna?refcode=emfooter20210220&t=23&refcode2=1650_946728_iQ2BhC&akid=1650%2E946728%2EiQ2BhC)** | [](https://www.facebook.com/RoKhannaUSA) | [](https://twitter.com/RoKhanna)
---|---|---
Paid for by Ro for Congress
PO Box 3513, Santa Clara, CA 95051
Email us: [info@rokhanna.com](mailto:info@rokhanna.com)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we stay in touch with you, but if you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.rokhanna.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=1650%2E946728%2EiQ2BhC).
